input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IN.15.1.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: in.15.1.1
            TITLE: any vehicle may be reinspected at any time for any reason

            CONTENT:
            rule IN.15.1.1: Any vehicle may be Reinspected at any time for any reason
IN.15.1.1 Any vehicle may be Reinspected at any time for any reason

final_answer: Any vehicle may be Reinspected at any time for any reason
